description_long: This object is a classic Nintendo 64 game cartridge, specifically for the game 'Diddy Kong Racing.' The cartridge is made of light gray plastic with a curved top and a rectangular base, featuring a colorful label on the front with the game's title and artwork. The front label displays the Nintendo 64 logo and the ESRB rating, while the back side contains molded text and safety information. The bottom edge has a row of exposed gold-plated connector pins, which interface with the game console. The cartridge is compact, with rounded corners and a robust, utilitarian design typical of late 1990s video game media. Its construction suggests durability for repeated handling and insertion into a console.
description: A gray Nintendo 64 game cartridge for 'Diddy Kong Racing' with a colorful front label and gold connector pins on the bottom.
description_view_0: The front of the cartridge shows the 'Diddy Kong Racing' label with vibrant artwork and the Nintendo 64 logo.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the cartridge's thickness and the curved top, with the label edge just visible.
description_view_2: The back of the cartridge displays molded safety and copyright information, as well as the connector pins.
description_view_3: Another side view, showing the opposite edge and the back label, with the connector pins partially visible.
